---
title: "Intro to Robotics"
subtitle: "From Water Pipes to Computer Logic"
description: "Master the fundamentals of electronics, microcontrollers, and logic through interactive simulations and hands-on builds."
format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, slides_template/assets/sdaia.scss]
    css: index_style.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-section}
# Intro to Robotics {.main-title}
Master the fundamentals of electronics, logic, and physical computing.
:::

::: {.container}

## 📚 Curriculum Slides
Explore the core concepts through our interactive slide decks.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .slide-card}
::: {.card-body}
### [Session 1: Circuits Basics](slides/session1.qmd)
From Water Pipes to Computer Logic. Covering voltage, current, resistance, and the bridge to electronics.
[View Slides →](slides/session1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .slide-card}
::: {.card-body}
### [Session 2: Movement + Problem Patterns](slides/session2.qmd)
From physical assembly to autonomous movement. Mastering the basics of robot locomotion and problem identification.
[View Slides →](slides/session2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .slide-card}
::: {.card-body}
### [Session 3: Building the Smart Radar](slides/session3.qmd)
Giving your project eyes and movement. Building a radar system using an ultrasonic sensor and a servo motor.
[View Slides →](slides/session3.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 🚀 Interactive Simulations
Visualize complex concepts through real-time web-based simulations.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .sim-card}
::: {.card-body}
### [Water Circuit Sim](simulations/water_circuit/index.html)
Interactive visualization of voltage (pressure), current (flow), and resistance (valves) using a water pipe analogy.
[Launch Sim →](simulations/water_circuit/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-teal .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .sim-card}
::: {.card-body}
### [Water Resistors Sim](simulations/water_resistors/index.html)
A deeper dive into resistor networks. Visualize how series and parallel connections affect water flow and pressure.
[Launch Sim →](simulations/water_resistors/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-teal .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

:::

:::
